description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a loose hoodie with a pastel tie-dye pattern and fitted jogger-style pants. The hoodie has a front pocket and drawstrings, and the sleeves are slightly rolled up, revealing the wrists. The figure has a well-groomed beard and a distinctive undercut hairstyle with the longer hair tied back in a ponytail. Visible tattoos adorn the left side of the face and neck, adding to the urban, contemporary look. The footwear consists of low-top sneakers, and the figure's hands are relaxed at the sides. The overall build is athletic, and the posture is upright and neutral, suitable for a pedestrian in a city environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a hoodie, jogger pants, sneakers, and a ponytail, featuring facial tattoos and an upright stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pastel tie-dye hoodie, facial tattoos, beard, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ponytail, profile of the face, and the rolled-up sleeve.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hoodie, ponytail, and the fit of the jogger pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, ponytail, and the relaxed arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hoodie and jogger pants with rolled sleeves
attribute_hairstyle: undercut with long hair tied in a ponytail
